# TKT-416: Replace weak migration-era comments with current architectural intent and lock key generated files with snapshots.

<!-- docket: Direct edits are allowed. After editing this ticket, run `docket validate TKT-416` before committing. -->

## Description
Objective: Replace weak migration-era comments with current architectural intent and lock key generated files with snapshots.

Context:
This is cleanup of migration-era sludge. Delete compatibility leftovers, private residue, and dead artifacts so the core repo reads like a deliberate framework instead of a rescued product codebase.

Rails/Laravel DX bar:
- Prefer one obvious convention, delete fallback paths, and keep the generated or framework-owned surface beautiful enough to feel like Rails or Laravel.

Likely files:
- framework/
- static/
- styles/
- docs/
- LLM.txt

Likely symbols:
- CheckHardCutDocWording
- checkCanonicalDocsHardReset

Tests to add or update:
- tools/cli/ship/internal/policies/doctor_golden_contract_test.go
- tools/cli/ship/internal/commands/oss_docs_contract_test.go

Verify commands:
- docket validate TKT-416
- go test ./tools/cli/ship/internal/policies ./tools/cli/ship/internal/commands -count=1

Out of scope:
- Broad refactors outside the scoped ownership surface for this ticket.
- Writing roadmap docs that are not required to keep code and tests aligned.
- Taking shortcuts that preserve multiple competing conventions instead of choosing one clear path.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Code changes are limited to the described scope.
- [ ] Automated tests for the changed behavior pass.
- [ ] Verification commands and outcomes are recorded in ticket notes or handoff.
